---
title: "Plots and Analysis"
author: "Ben Wasserman"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(viridis)
library(ggpubr)
library(colorspace)
library(grid)
library(gdata)
library(str2str)
library(parallel)
library(beepr)

```

```{r definefunctions}
datasubset <- function(x){
  filter(x[[1]], Time == 600)
}

```

```{r loaddata}

nameslist <- c("A_2024_03_22", "B_2024_03_23", "C_2024_03_23", "D_2024_03_23", "E_2024_03_24", "F_2024_03_24", "G_2024_03_24", "H_2024_03_24", "I_2024_03_25", "J_2025_04_01", "K_2025_04_01", "L_2025_04_02", "M_2025_04_03", "N_2025_04_04", "O_2025_04_07", "P_2025_04_08", "Q_2025_04_09",  "R_2025_04_10", "S_2025_04_10", "T_2025_04_11", "U_2025_04_11", "V_2025_04_15", "W_2025_04_16", "X_2025_04_17", "Y_2025_04_21", "Z_2025_04_22")

Paramdfcombined <- vector(mode = "list", length = length(nameslist))
results_mclapplycombined <- vector(mode = "list", length(nameslist))
for (i in 1:length(nameslist)) {
  load(file = paste0("Outputs/Parallel/", nameslist[i], "_Outputs.Rdata"))
  Paramdfcombined[[i]] <- Paramdf
  results_mclapplycombined[[i]] <- results_mclapply
}
Paramdfall <- ld2d(Paramdfcombined)

results_mclapplyall <- unlist(results_mclapplycombined, recursive = FALSE)

beep(sound = 6)

#This gets us a 3d array with all of the outputs
DRlistlist <- mclapply(results_mclapplyall, FUN = "[[", 3, mc.cores = 15)
DRlistarray <- lm2a(DRlistlist)

beep(sound = 6)

landlist <- mclapply(results_mclapplyall, FUN = "[[", 2, mc.cores = 15)
landarray <- ld2a(landlist)

landarrayending <- landarray
landarrayending[,1,] <- landarray[,1,]+5

beep(sound = 6)

datalist <- mclapply(results_mclapplyall, FUN = datasubset, mc.cores = 15)
dataarray <- ld2a(datalist)

beep(sound = 4)

datamatrix <- matrix(dataarray, )


save.image("loadedFullList.Rdata")



```
